name: lokkho
description: Job Preparation Management App — backend + frontend monorepo
author: Md Rejoyan Islam <rejoyanislam0014@gmail.com>

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "bun run dev:backend" "bun run dev:frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && bun run start" "cd frontend && bun run start"
scripts.install:all: bun install && cd backend && bun install && cd ../frontend && bun install
